panels.title: Active visitors by exhibition and room

targets.rawSql: WITH (SELECT max(window_start) FROM gallery.gallery_occupancy_5m) AS max_time SELECT now() - toIntervalSecond(toUnixTimestamp(max_time) - toUnixTimestamp(window_start)) AS time, concat(exhibition_id, char(32), char(47), char(32), room_id) AS metric, active_visitors FROM gallery.gallery_occupancy_5m WHERE window_start >= max_time - toIntervalMinute(59) ORDER BY time

WITH (SELECT max(window_start) FROM gallery.gallery_occupancy_5m) AS max_time SELECT exhibition_id, sum(views) AS views, sum(likes) AS likes FROM gallery.gallery_occupancy_5m WHERE window_start >= max_time - toIntervalMinute(59) GROUP BY exhibition_id ORDER BY views DESC
